title: Google's New AI Architecture Changes Everything (Gemma 4 12B)
summary: Google DeepMind released Gemma 4 12B, a multimodal AI model that processes images and audio directly from raw pixels and waveforms without separate encoder models. The architecture eliminates intermediate models for vision and audio processing, enabling faster inference and offline operation on devices like Apple Silicon.
